subject: aadb0a6abcbe764ed
findings:
- id: F1
    severity: minor
    text: "Brief claimed the scripts/probes 'sh not recognized' gap is logged in docs/friction-log.md; grep of docs/friction-log.md and docs/ found no such entry. Real, pre-existing, not caused by this car's work; not fixed here (out of #33's scope), only disclosed."
  - id: F2
    severity: minor
    text: "Brief stated Pester scripts/tests baseline as 247; observed baseline at base commit b675062815fc1399edd3714588f5ed81f57a38d was 250/250, both before and after this car's changes, so this car introduces no Pester delta but the brief's stated number does not match observation."
  - id: F3
    severity: minor
    text: "CLAUDE.md mandates gitnexus_impact/gitnexus_detect_changes before editing symbols; no GitNexus tool was present in this dispatch's actual toolset (only Bash, PowerShell, Read, Edit, Write, Glob, Grep). Disclosed rather than silently skipped. Actual blast radius verified independently: zero existing Go/JS symbols net-modified in the final diff against base (confirmed via git diff --stat b675062...HEAD showing only new files plus two doc/CI edits; the two CSS fault-injections were reverted byte-identical before commit)."
  - id: F4
    severity: minor
    text: "Task 3's regenerate-screenshot.mjs landed in the same commit as Tasks 1/2/4 rather than a separate commit; it reuses Task 2's real-board-server.js so the coupling is genuine, but a strict one-commit-per-task reading would have split it."
abstract: "Car 33 closes issue #33 on branch car/33-playwright at commit 7fabf8a9abe958e6e516b1e1683ccbcce7185dda (base b675062815fc1399edd3714588f5ed81f57a38d verified). Added board/web/test/browser-register-cascade.test.js, driving the playwright LIBRARY (never @playwright/test) inside plain node --test against the REAL board/server/ Go binary reading the REAL artifacts/ store, asserting only on getComputedStyle values (never pixel diffing), per the owner's binding amendment. Proved non-vacuity by two fault injections into board/web/css/board.css (missing color declaration, then color: inherit), both observed RED with quoted failure messages, both reverted byte-identical (confirmed empty git diff). The color: inherit injection demonstrates concretely that register-css.test.js's regex guard stays green while this new test goes red - issue #35's finding made live. Probed (not assumed) that `go run ./server` orphans a grandchild process on kill (measured EADDRINUSE) versus building-then-spawning a binary, which was measured deterministic. Added board/web/package.json + package-lock.json (first in the repo, playwright 1.61.1 pinned, ~18 MiB / 2 packages), gitignored node_modules/, wired CI to install --only-shell chromium (~274 MiB measured, versus ~690 MiB default) with --with-deps and actions/cache on both matrix legs, and proved directly that a missing browser fails loudly (hookFailed, exit 1) rather than silently skipping, needing no new CI guard beyond the existing zero-test-refusal step. Updated docs/setup.md's Node.js row and ci.yml's step comments in the same commit per the owner's mid-dispatch ruling: framed as the existing D19 distinction (shipped browser runtime versus Node/test-tooling) extended to Playwright, gate-triggered by #33, with the shipped-runtime-has-no-build-step claim preserved as still true. Added board/web/regenerate-screenshot.mjs (Task 3, reuses the same server helper, no assertions, not part of the automated suite); ran it once and deliberately did not overwrite the existing historical docs/screenshots/2026-07-23-first-light.png, since that file is itself the historical evidence of #31's discovery. Final observed counts at the landing commit: node --test (board/web) 59/59, go vet + go test (board/) 5/5 packages, Pester scripts/tests 250/250, Pester scripts/probes 11/12 (one pre-existing, unrelated environment gap, not a regression). Four minor findings disclosed: a brief citation to docs/friction-log.md that does not check out, a Pester baseline number mismatch against direct observation, GitNexus tooling mandated by CLAUDE.md but absent from this dispatch's toolset, and Task 3 landing in the same commit as Tasks 1/2/4 rather than separately."
